writePrerequisites.description: akita-validate must consume the persisted generated artifact bundle and provenance bundle from disk before it evaluates capability eligibility.

requiredMachineState.description: Inspectable validation verdict, reviewed artifact set, and per-artifact findings for supported, unsupported, or bundle-unknown constructs.

validationReport.description: The validation report is the durable inspection surface for verdicts, reviewed artifacts, and explicit rejection reasons.

stopConditions.description: The generated artifact bundle is missing, so validation cannot establish what to review.
The provenance bundle is missing, so validation cannot confirm lineage back to the approved plan and bundle truth.
A manifest-listed capability bundle asset is missing, so validation must stop instead of guessing rules.
Unsupported steps or assertions must be rejected explicitly with clear findings.
Any construct that cannot be grounded in manifest-listed bundle truth must fail validation explicitly.
Generated artifacts that diverge from the lineage recorded by akita-write must fail validation instead of passing partial coverage.

summaryState.description: Human-readable validation summary only. Canonical machine state stays in the JSON report above.
